mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, scope, is_system FROM role ORDER BY is_system DESC, id
SELECT id, code, name, scope, is_system FROM role WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, code, name, scope, is_system FROM role WHERE code = #{code} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role (code, name, scope, is_system) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{scope}, #{isSystem})
mapper.update: UPDATE role SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, scope = #{scope} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_global_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_domain_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_domain_role (user_id, role_id, business_domain_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, #{businessDomainId})
INSERT INTO iam_role_binding (user_id, role_id, binding_scope, business_domain_id, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, 'global', NULL, 1)
INSERT INTO iam_role_binding (user_id, role_id, binding_scope, business_domain_id, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, 'domain', #{businessDomainId}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT r.code FROM role r JOIN ( SELECT role_id FROM user_global_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT role_id FROM user_domain_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) ur ON ur.role_id = r.id JOIN iam_role_resource irr ON irr.role_id = r.id JOIN iam_resource ir ON ir.id = irr.resource_id WHERE ir.status = 1 AND (ir.client_scope = #{clientCode} OR ir.client_scope = 'all')
SELECT id, code, scope FROM role WHERE code IN #{code}
SELECT DISTINCT business_domain_id FROM user_domain_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY business_domain_id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ugr.user_id) FROM user_global_role ugr JOIN role r ON r.id = ugr.role_id JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = ugr.user_id WHERE r.code = #{roleCode} AND ugr.user_id <> #{userId} AND ua.status = 1 AND ua.employment_status <> 'offboarded'
SELECT id, code, name FROM business_domain ORDER BY id

SELECT DISTINCT d.id, d.code, d.name FROM user_domain_role udr JOIN role r ON r.id = udr.role_id JOIN business_domain d ON d.id = udr.business_domain_id WHERE udr.user_id = #{userId} AND r.code IN #{code} ORDER BY d.id
SELECT scope FROM role WHERE id = #{id}
